fixed: CI verification coverage - the Android workflow now blocks on explicit Kotlin compile and unit test checks
Stable release auto-trigger scope - the main release workflow no longer auto-runs on every push to main
Lint report visibility - standard debug lint now runs as an advisory CI step and uploads reports
Unit test Kotlin assertions - the app module now includes the Kotlin JUnit test bridge
Unit test temp directory API - split artifact tests now use kotlin.io.path.createTempDirectory
JVM-safe URL parsing - URL validation and source-host detection now use Java URI parsing
MediaStore API guard - the legacy delete path now returns early below Android 10
Lint compatibility cleanup - the stderr ring buffer now uses removeAt(0)
Compose locale observability - download history summary text now derives lowercase formatting from LocalConfiguration
Compose resource lookup cleanup - settings, history, player, queue, update changelog, and YouTube auth screens now capture resource values in composition
Localized queue format strings - the Simplified Chinese queue subtitle and resume-window strings now match the placeholder arguments
Localized common remove label - the shared common_remove string is now translated in supported resource sets
Localized fallback resource coverage - supported locale sets now include newer downloads, player, queue recovery, history search, and repo-safe update strings and plurals
Locale-safe formatting and zh placeholder sync - duration and file-size formatting now use an explicit locale
Locale bundle, PiP, and backup config cleanup - target SDK now aligns with compile SDK 36 and backup extraction rules are declared explicitly
Media3 opt-in cleanup - player screen and player viewmodel setup now explicitly opt into the unstable Media3 APIs
Media3 resize mode decoupling - player state and resize option labels now use app-owned resize mode constants
Tagged release validation - version tags now fail fast when github.ref_name does not match APP_VERSION_NAME
Artifact cleanup pagination - scheduled cleanup now paginates through the full artifact list
Cookie export feedback - exporting cookies to a file now surfaces success and real write failures
Paused-download cleanup scope - expired paused downloads now clean up only the app-managed artifacts for that task
Public export write safety - Android 10+ public-download export now treats MediaStore stream-open failures as real failures
Large analyze memory pressure - link analysis now prefers the captured info-json snapshot and caps retained stdout text
WorkManager observer cleanup - per-task work observers are now replaced and canceled cleanly on retries, resumes, and terminal states
improved: Wrapper-first builds - local docs and GitHub Actions now use the checked-in Gradle wrapper
Split Android workflows - CI build, nightly publishing, main release, and tag release now live in separate GitHub Actions files
PR-visible nightly artifacts - nightly now runs for pull requests targeting main and uploads a debug APK artifact
Safer runtime update blocking - yt-dlp updates now wait for queued, running, or paused downloads
